blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 89). Defects: agency logo lacks contrast and is hard to see at the top left corner; contact CTA is not sufficiently prominent or large for mobile social viewing; significant unused white space in the middle and bottom sections results in dead canvas; the key recruitment headline is not visually dominant enough compared to the agency name and location line; the QRC is not visually integrated and appears as an afterthought with minimal styling; IMPROVE_SPACING: The lower half of the image has large empty white space that feels like unused canvas, reducing proportional balance.; INCREASE_HEADLINE_EMPHASIS: 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT' headline could be slightly larger or more visually dominant for immediate clarity on mobile devices.; OTHER: The interview date buttons appear somewhat disconnected and inconsistent in spacing, confusing visual flow.; Repetitive phrasing 'Experience in shutdown projects mandatory' reduces text dynamism; Interview dates could have stronger visual grouping for easier scanning

requiredCorrections.note: Enlarge and reposition the contact phone and email to increase prominence and ease of contact on mobile devices.
Enhance the visibility and contrast of the agency logo in the top left corner for clear agency identity.
Reduce unused white space by tightening layout vertically and redistributing content to avoid large dead canvas areas.
Make the 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT' headline more dominant visually to immediately capture candidate attention.
Redesign the QR code area for better integration with the footer section, making it look designed-in rather than a sticker.

OTHER: The interview date buttons appear somewhat disconnected and inconsistent in spacing, confusing visual flow.
